subcodes.first_line: Say: The sun of the remembrance of our Lord, the Most Merciful, the Most Compassionate, hath verily dawned from the Dayspring of the Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل قد اشرقت عن مشرق الأمر شمس ذکر ربنا الرحمن الرحیم
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @justice and wrath of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
